elements.title: Elisabeth Park
elements.contents: ... that the layout of Elisabeth Park (pictured) forms the royal monogram of Leopold II of Belgium?

elements.title: Robert S. Cooper
elements.contents: ... that Robert S. Cooper directed the development of GPS while at the Pentagon?

elements.title: Kyoto Hinode Shimbun
elements.contents: ... that staff of the newspaper the Kyoto Hinode Shimbun once defended their office from a mob by spraying rioters with water hoses?

elements.title: Shiyazh Pete
elements.contents: ... that Shiyazh Pete is the first player from the Navajo Nation to sign with a National Football League team?

elements.title: Pisces VII
elements.contents: ... that Pisces VII, a dwarf satellite galaxy, is the first galaxy in the Local Group to be discovered by an amateur astronomer?

elements.title: Cleveland Academy of Music
elements.contents: ... that John Wilkes Booth gave a thrilling performance at the Cleveland Academy of Music while bleeding heavily from an accidental sword wound?

elements.title: Kathryn Otley
elements.contents: ... that Anglican priest Kathryn Otley hosted a drag queen story hour at her church after the event was disrupted by a protest at its original location?

elements.title: 2025 Indian Premier League final
elements.contents: ... that Krunal Pandya was named the player of the match in the 2025 Indian Premier League final, becoming the first cricketer to win the award in two IPL finals?

elements.title: Mary Smith
elements.contents: ... that Mary Smith woke hundreds of people up every day by shooting peas at their windows?
